description: Composition Cardinal pink top with floral print, made of 100% cotton, with short set-in sleeves that are mildly elasticated, has a Mandarin collar neck with a buttoned chest placket, fabric tape on inseam of the collar, and has a split hem on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash warm using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron/do not iron on print or embroidery Get colourful, get stylish with this comfortable cotton top from lee. The floral print in black and light blue on cardinal pink adds to this top an energetic vibe. Team it with jeans, chinos or skirts and spread the cheer. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
